mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_prize (prize_id, prize_type, prize_name, prize_content) VALUES (#{prizeId}, #{prizeType}, #{prizeName}, #{prizeContent})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM pw_prize p INNER JOIN pw_policy_prize pp ON p.prize_id = pp.prize_id INNER JOIN pw_draw_policy dp ON pp.policy_id = dp.policy_id INNER JOIN pw_campaign c ON c.policy_id = dp.policy_id WHERE c.campaign_id = #{campaignId} ORDER BY pp.win_rate DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_prize ORDER BY created_at DESC
